title: 4級 模擬テスト3 リスニング第1部 (Miami) 1
prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
audioText:
A: Have you had the chance to visit the environmental projects in Miami, Lisa?
B: Yes, although there were many people there.
A: I see. Would you recommend it to others?
choices: 与えられたテーマに沿った、適切な構成と内容の解答.
単語数が不足している不十分な解答
テーマから外れた無関係な解答
explanation: grade4-03-listening1-01: リスニング第1部の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 語句整序 1
prompt:
日本文の意味に合うように語句を並べ替えたとき、最も自然な文を選びなさい。

彼女は2011年からenvironmental projectsのために毎日一生懸命働いています。
She ( 1. working / 2. for / 3. is / 4. hard ) the environmental projects since 2011.
[Mock 3-1]
explanation: grade4-03-ordering-01: 語句整序の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

[Mock 3-2]

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 読解 1
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, environmental projects has become very popular in Rome. Since 2011, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 117 more events related to environmental projects.
choices: Because they want to make money.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 読解 7
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, public transportation has become very popular in Berlin. Since 2017, many residents gather on weekends. Lisa, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 159 more events related to public transportation.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-07: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 読解 8
prompt: 対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
passage: Recently, space exploration has become very popular in Boston. Since 2018, many residents gather on weekends. Eve, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 166 more events related to space exploration.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-08: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 読解 9
prompt: 対話を聞いて、最後の発言に最も合う応答を一つ選んでください。
passage: Recently, historical monuments has become very popular in Paris. Since 2019, many residents gather on weekends. Rachel, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 173 more events related to historical monuments.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-09: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 4級 模擬テスト3 読解 10
prompt: 会話を聞き、最後の発言への適切な応答を選択してください。
passage: Recently, wildlife conservation has become very popular in Osaka. Since 2020, many residents gather on weekends. Ken, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 180 more events related to wildlife conservation.
explanation: grade4-03-reading-10: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
